entries.title: National Conference for Character Education
entries.subtitle: National Conference
entries.summary: Annual conference dedicated to Romania’s Character Education ecosystem.
highlights: Panels for school leaders and teachers
Dialogue among practitioners, researchers, and NGOs
impact: Increases national visibility of character education.

entries.subtitle: National / Regional Celebration
entries.summary: Theme day activating schools and communities through public virtue-focused activities.
highlights: Workshops for students, parents, and teachers

entries.title: Gritty Education
entries.subtitle: Non-profit initiative led by Liliana Hadji
entries.summary: Grassroots Romanian initiative promoting virtues across children, parents, educators, and communities.
highlights: Leads practical character education programs in schools and family contexts.
Builds local momentum through training, workshops, and media formats.
Connects virtue practice to everyday educational environments.
programs: Character Science Consultancy for adults and organisations
Children’s Character Journal: Playing with Gritty
impact: Growing grassroots movement in Romanian schools, families, and communities.

entries.title: Education through Virtues and Stories
entries.summary: National Romanian initiative using virtues and storytelling to build moral character in school life.
highlights: Supports teachers, schools, and families with practical character education tools.
Integrates virtues across daily classroom routines and school culture.
Focuses on responsibility, respect, honesty, patience, and care.
impact: Helps shape students who are responsible, empathetic, resilient, and guided by integrity.
Contributes to a stronger culture of character in Romanian schools.
entries.description: National Romanian initiative using virtues and storytelling to build moral character in school life.
